message:
bench(inference): add Criterion benchmarks for HSMM, robust inference, and compound Poisson (process_triage-dki.15)

11 benchmark groups, 41 scenarios covering HsmmAnalyzer (update/batch/summarize),
RobustGate (tempered posterior/credal ops/eta tempering), MinimaxGate
(is_safe/LFP/stability), and CompoundPoissonAnalyzer (observe/analyze/evidence/regime).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -156,6 +156,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "escalation_fleet"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "inference_advanced"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "fleet_integration"
 path = "tests/fleet_integration.rs"
